snapshot.summary: Webhooks are custom callbacks the Housecall provides to developers to make them aware of useful events triggered by our Pros.
snapshot.data:
# Webhooks

Webhooks are custom callbacks the Housecall provides to developers to make them aware of useful events triggered by our Pros.

- To have webhooks configured for an individual Housecall Pro account, follow [these instructions.](https://help.housecallpro.com/en/articles/5683520-how-to-enable-webhooks)
- To have webhooks configured for your OAuth Application send an email with your URL to <apideveloper@housecallpro.com>.


## Webhook security

Housecall Pro signs webhook events sent to your endpoint. In order to ensure that events are sent by Housecall Pro and not a third party, you can verify this signature.

Housecall Pro includes two important headers with each webhook event:

**Api-Timestamp:** The timestamp in seconds since the epoch (Example: 1677189615)

**Api-Signature:** A cryptographic hash generated using your signing secret, the timestamp, and the webhook payload.

### Verification Steps


1. Retrieve Your Signing Secret:  Obtain your signing secret from your Housecall Pro account
2. Construct the Signature Body:  Concatenate the Api-Timestamp header, a dot (.) character, and the JSON representation of the payload as an entity we’ll call the Signature Body
> signature_body = timestamp + "." + json_payload
3. Compute an HMAC with the SHA256 hash function. Use your signing secret as the key. Use the signature_body you constructed as the message
4. Compare Signatures: Verify that your calculated HMAC matches the value provided in the Api-Signature header. If they match, the webhook is authentic.


## Common Fields

All webhook payloads include shared metadata:

- `event`: Event key that identifies the webhook event name.
- `company_id`: Company/location that owns the affected record.
- `event_occurred_at`: UTC timestamp (ISO 8601) for when the event occurred.

## Job Webhook Events

Event Name | Event Key | Description
---------|----------|---------
Job created | job.created | Job created 
Job updated | job.updated | Job updated 
Job canceled | job.canceled | Job canceled 
Job completed | job.completed | Job completed
Job deleted | job.deleted | Job deleted 
Job on my way | job.on_my_way | Job on my way 
Job paid | job.paid | Job paid
Job scheduled | job.scheduled | Job scheduled 
Job started | job.started | Job started 

### Job Webhook Protocol

```json
{
  "company_id": "string",
  "event": "job.created",
  "event_occurred_at": "string",
  "job": {
    "id": "string",
    "invoice_number": "string",
    "description": "string",
    "customer": {
      "id": "string",
      "first_name": "string",
      "last_name": "string",
      "email": "string",
      "mobile_number": "string",
      "home_number": "string",
      "work_number": "string",
      "company": "string",
      "notifications_enabled": "boolean",
      "lead_source": "string",
      "tags": [
        "string"
      ]
    },
    "address": {
      "id": "string",
      "street": "string",
      "street_line_2": "string",
      "city": "string",
      "state": "string",
      "zip": "string",
      "country": "string",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "notes": [
      {
        "id": "string",
        "content": "string"
      }
    ],
    "work_status": "unscheduled",
    "work_timestamps": {
      "started_at": "string",
      "completed_at": "string",
      "on_my_way_at": "string"
    },
    "schedule": {
      "scheduled_start": "string",
      "scheduled_end": "string",
      "arrival_window": "string"
    },
    "total_amount": 0,
    "outstanding_balance": 0,
    "subtotal": 0,
    "assigned_employees": [
      {
        "id": "string",
        "avatar_url": "string",
        "color_hex": "string",
        "first_name": "string",
        "last_name": "string",
        "email": "string",
        "mobile_number": "string",
        "role": "field tech",
        "tags": [
          "string"
        ],
        "permissions": {
          "can_add_and_edit_job": "boolean",
          "can_be_booked_online": "boolean",
          "can_call_and_text_with_customers": "boolean",
          "can_chat_with_customers": "boolean",
          "can_delete_and_cancel_job": "boolean",
          "can_edit_message_on_invoice": "boolean",
          "can_see_street_view_data": "boolean",
          "can_share_job": "boolean",
          "can_take_payment_see_prices": "boolean",
          "can_see_customers": "boolean",
          "can_see_full_schedule": "boolean",
          "can_see_future_jobs": "boolean",
          "can_see_marketing_campaigns": "boolean",
          "can_see_reporting": "boolean",
          "can_edit_settings": "boolean",
          "is_point_of_contact": "boolean",
          "is_admin": "boolean"
        }
      }
    ],
    "tags": [
      "string"
    ],
    "original_estimate_id": "string",
    "original_estimate_uuids": ["string"],
    "lead_source": "string",
    "job_fields": {
      "job_type": {
        "id": "string",
        "name": "string"
      },
      "business_unit":  {
        "id": "string",
        "name": "string"
      }
    },
    "attachments": [
      {
        "id": "string",
        "file_name": "string",
        "url": "string",
        "file_type": "string"
      }
    ],
    "appointments": [
      {
        "id": "string",
        "start_time": "string",
        "end_time": "string",
        "arrival_window": "string"
      }
    ],
    "rerecurrence_number": 0,
    "recurrence_rule": "string"
  }
}
```

## Job Appointment Webhook Events

Event Name | Event Key | Description
---------|----------|---------
Job appointment scheduled | job.appointment.scheduled | Pro created a new appointment for a job
Job appointment rescheduled | job.appointment.rescheduled | A specific job appointment got rescheduled
Job appointment discarded | job.appointment.appointment_discarded | A specific job appointment got discarded
Job appointment appointment pros assigned | job.appointment.appointment_pros_assigned | Specific job appointment dispatched employees changed
Job appointment appointment pros unassigned | job.appointment.appointment_pros_unassigned | Specific job appointment dispatched employees removed
